findings.message: Breaking schema change: the `Item.name` field was renamed to `title` with no compatibility path. Existing GraphQL clients querying `name` will get a validation error since the field no longer exists. This is a backwards-incompatible removal/rename, not an additive change.
findings.suggestion: Keep `name` (optionally `@deprecated`) and add `title` alongside it, or expose `title` as a resolver that aliases the same underlying `row.name` while retaining `name` until clients migrate.
